Did you see himFootnote-1 who gives the lie to the Reward and PunishmentFootnote-2 of the Hereafter?Footnote-3
Such isFootnote-4 the one who repulses the orphans away,Footnote-5
and urgesFootnote-6 not the feeding of the needy.Footnote-7
Woe, then, to those who pray,Footnote-8
but are heedless in their Prayers,Footnote-9
those who do good (in order) to be seen,Footnote-10
and deny people the articles of common necessity.Footnote-11
